text:
September 4th: Part 14 (94⑭, Kugatsu Yokka (Jū Yon)) is the 115 th chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

After Phinks, Shalnark, and Feitan arrive at the Hotel Beitacle, the other Phantom Troupe members tell them that Chrollo was kidnapped during a blackout, with Kortopi handing them the message from the chain user. Feitan wonders why they didn't chase after them, but Nobunaga explains that Machi and Pakunoda were injured during the incident, adding that the chain user has professional Hunters with him and that the two boys are on par with them. Feitan still wonders why they didn't give chase, and Nobunaga tells him to reread the message, stressing that Chrollo can't escape by himself since he's probably being restrained by the same chains that were used on Uvogin.

Phinks is left confused by his assumption that Chrollo was chained, and Nobunaga angrily repeats that there was a blackout and that the chain user was gone once they could see again. He stresses that they need to keep the two boys as hostages, and Shalnark gets everyone's attention by saying that they need to stay together as a group and treat Machi and Pakunoda's injuries while they go after Chrollo. As Shalnark begins to talk about what they will do if they find their car, Phinks' phone suddenly rings. Elsewhere in the city, Milluki is seen at a restaurant wondering what he should have for dinner.

Kurapika says that he will give him three instructions, and even though Phinks immediately asks if he's the chain user, Kurapika says that he will obey them or his leader will die. His three orders are to not come after them or harm the hostages, and to put Pakunoda on the phone. Phinks asks about the second order and tells Kurapika that the hostages broke some bones before they arrived, chuckling as he gives a sly smile toward the other Troupe members. Kurapika says that the negotiations are off and immediately hangs up.

Phinks quickly calls back and apologizes for lying about the hostages being injured. Kurapika says that it's his only warning and again tells him to give the phone to Pakunoda. After he does so, both Pakunoda and Nobunaga hit him on the head. Nobunaga reminds him that Chrollo's life is on the line, and Phinks says that he was just trying to help. After Pakunoda answers, Kurapika says that she will be the only one to hear the call, telling her to step away from the others. Kurapika then asks her if she has met Squala and confirms that she knows about Melody, who can tell if she lies at all. He forbids Pakunoda from having any further contact with the other Troupe members (including gesturing or even eye contact). He tells her to come alone to a location that he will specify and that he will kill Chrollo if there's any change in her pulse.

Kurapika then tells her to give the phone to someone besides the person who initially answered. Pakunoda hands it to Nobunaga, and Kurapika explains that while Pakunoda will leave by herself, the rest of the Troupe must stay back at their hideout. He tells him to give the phone to Pakunoda and to get another cell phone for when they call back. He warns that Chrollo will die if any of them are missing from the hideout, and Nobunaga understands his instructions, giving the phone back to Pakunoda. Kurapika tells her to be at Lingon Airport by eight o'clock.

Pakunoda immediately begins to leave the hotel without saying anything or even looking at the other members. Nobunaga tells them that she has to go alone while they return to the hideout. Phinks, however, doesn't care about the chain user's order to not come after him, and Nobunaga angrily grabs him by the collar and reminds him that Chrollo's life is at stake. Phinks calls him an idiot and calmly points out that they will then kill the chain user to put an end to it all. With Nobunaga left stunned, Feitan reminds him that Chrollo would agree that the Spiders should be the priority, adding that his mindset is an insult to the group. Phinks says that he isn't joking about following Pakunoda, and Shalnark agrees that they shouldn't obey the chain user's orders since their fortunes will end up coming true.

Machi and Kortopi agree with Nobunaga about obeying the chain user's orders for the time being, but Phinks asks them if they should wait until half of them are dead before doing anything. He then asks Shizuku what she thinks, and she asks if they should flip a coin, but he replies that the discussion is beyond their mission now. She decides to agree with Nobunaga and says that she doesn't want Chrollo or Pakunoda to die yet, pointing out that Pakunoda felt the same way since she left without saying anything. Phinks lets out a big sigh and says that he can't get through to him, suddenly becoming serious and saying that he would like to kill them if they didn't have to follow Pakunoda.

However, as Phinks begins to leave, Nobunaga readies his katana and warns him not to move another step. Phinks readies his aura in response and asks him to try it, but Shizuku hits Nobunaga on the back of the head with Blinky and knocks him unconscious. Phinks wonders why she did that if she agreed with him, but Shizuku replies that while she does in her heart, the rules are absolute, reminding them that there's no fighting within the Troupe and that breaking the rules is the same as rejecting the Spiders and Chrollo.

Shalnark's phone suddenly rings, but before Phinks can even say hello, Kurapika orders him to give the phone to the hostages. Killua says that they are okay for now and that the Troupe members were arguing about whether they should follow Pakunoda. Phinks quickly takes the phone back, and Kurapika reveals to him that Pakunoda only followed his instructions because they have someone who can tell if any of them are lying. He again warns them that Chrollo's life is on the line and tells them to be at their hideout in thirty minutes. After Kurapika hangs up, a frustrated Phinks realizes that they have no choice but to follow his orders.

At the Troupe's hideout, Franklin tells Bonolenov that the others are coming back since all of them need to be there or Chrollo will die. He calls the chain user intelligent for using the hostages to receive updates, and Bonolenov adds that he's tough as well. Hisoka is seen checking his phone and says to himself that while it's his only chance to fight him, Chrollo will die if he leaves. He wonders what he should do and decides to text Illumi for help. Standing on a rooftop elsewhere, Illumi agrees to help since he has known him a little longer than Chrollo, adding that it will cost him.
